violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Per PIC, test strips are on order. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were supplied at hand sink at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Establishment is not to use slicer until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The 1 door reach-in was observed held at 55 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food in unit was evaluated at the time of inspection. Shredded chicken and ground beef were observed at 55 DF and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to store any TCS foods in unit until unit is able to hold an ambient temperature of 41 DF or less. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

Deli meat and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Date was placed on food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025

The single cutting boards are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/24/2025
The 3-bay sink water was observed leaking into other bays and in poor repair. Establishment is to repair 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2025
The mop sink was observed is lacking a faucet and not plumbed. Establishment is to install faucet and plumb sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
Retail cooler door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024

Milk was observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. See disposal. New Violation. Correct By: 11/22/2024

The door to the outside, located in the front entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
Retail cooler door gaskets were observed torn and in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
At time of inspection, ambient of retail cooler was 47 degrees Fahrenheit. PIC called for service at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
